If you are referring to Echinacea, here's a paragraph:

Echinacea, also known as Eichlerina vulgaris (synonym), is a flowering plant of the daisy family that has been used in traditional medicine for centuries. The health benefits of Echinacea include its immunomodulatory and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it effective in preventing and treating the common cold, flu, and other infections. The bioactive constituents of Echinacea include alkylamides, caffeic acid derivatives, and polysaccharides, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made with Echinacea include teas, capsules, and tinctures, which are often used to boost the immune system and reduce the severity of cold and flu symptoms.
